entities.name: SAFFLOWER
entities.description: Major oilseeds crop with medicinal and industrial significance and high quality edible oil

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of genetic resources used to facilitate access and simplify genebank management

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL DESCRIPTORS
entities.description: 12 descriptors used to develop the core subset of safflower

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC INFORMATION
entities.description: Information on country of origin used for stratification of accessions

entities.name: WARD'S METHOD
entities.description: Clustering method used to group safflower accessions into clusters

entities.name: T-TEST
entities.description: Statistical method used for mean comparisons to verify preservation of genetic variation

entities.name: CHI-SQUARE TEST
entities.description: Statistical method used for frequency distribution analysis to verify preservation of genetic variation

entities.name: SHANNON-WEAVER DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: Method used to measure diversity of descriptors to verify preservation of genetic variation

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity available for traits in the safflower collection

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC CORRELATION COEFFICIENTS
entities.description: Method used to assess similarity in trait associations between the entire collection and core subset

entities.name: CO-ADAPTED GENE COMPLEXES
entities.description: Genetic structures controlling associations between traits

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to crop production to be evaluated in the core subset

entities.name: SEED QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the quality of seeds to be evaluated in the core subset

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental stresses to which resistance is evaluated

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Living organism-induced stresses to which resistance is evaluated
